title: calandrinia gayana var. glandulosa
intro: Calandrinia gayana var. glandulosa, also known as the Purple Poppy Morn or Purple Poppy Flower, is a flowering plant species within the calandrinia genus. It is used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and also used in folk remedies, although its efficacy and safety require further scientific study.
